output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?campus ?campusLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q4637473 wdt:P527 ?match .
  ?match wdt:P276 ?matchLocation .
  ?match p:P710 ?teamStmt1 , ?teamStmt2 .
  ?teamStmt1 ps:P710 ?team1 ; pq:P2503 ?score1 .
  ?teamStmt2 ps:P710 ?team2 ; pq:P2503 ?score2 .
  FILTER(?team1 != ?team2)
  FILTER((?score1 = "85" && ?score2 = "15") ||(?score1 = "15" && ?score2 = "85"))
  .
  ?team1 wdt:P1416 ?university1 .
  ?university1 wdt:P131 ?location1 .
  ?team2 wdt:P1416 ?university2 .
  ?university2 wdt:P131 ?location2 .
  FILTER((?score1 = "15" && ?location1 != ?matchLocation) ||(?score2 = "15" && ?location2 != ?matchLocation))
  .
  BIND(IF(?score1 = "15" && ?location1 != ?matchLocation , ?university1 , ?university2) AS ?awayUniversity)
  .
  ?awayUniversity wdt:P869 ?campus .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?campus rdfs:label ?campusLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?campusLabel) = "en")
  }
}
